title: Add support for X2GO client
author: computersrmyfriends
body_snippet:
Hello,
Can you please add support for X2GO client? It'll be very very useful if mremoteng works well with X2GO.

Thanks

iterations.description: Feature request with community support (+1s) to add X2Go as a new protocol/connection type, similar to existing RDP/VNC/SSH integrations
Bulk verified: commit e7a3ac61 exists (MEDIUM confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `e7a3ac61` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Add support for X2GO client

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork builds entirely on your fo...

notes:
AI triage: Feature request with community support (+1s) to add X2Go as a new protocol/connection type, similar to existing RDP/VNC/SSH integrations
Approach: Add X2Go as a new protocol type by creating a protocol handler that wraps the X2Go client (pyhoca-cli or x2goclient.exe), similar to how PuTTY/VNC external tools are integrated. Requires new ProtocolType enum value, connection info properties for X2Go-specific settings (session type, desktop environment, compression), and a protocol handler class that launches and manages the external X2Go client process.
